---
title: "Zheng Zhou"
description: "Academic homepage"
about:
  template: jolla
  image: images/profile-placeholder.svg
  image-shape: rounded
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:your.email@example.com
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/ZhouZheng-Stat01
    - icon: google
      text: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com/
---

## About

I am **Zheng Zhou**, a researcher working on topics around **your research area**, **your second research area**, and **your third research area**.

Replace this paragraph with a concise academic bio: your current affiliation, research interests, methods, and the kinds of questions you care about.

## Research Interests

- Research direction one
- Research direction two
- Research direction three
- Methods, datasets, or systems you often use

## News

- **May 2026**: This academic homepage is under construction.
- **Month 2026**: Add recent papers, talks, awards, or project updates here.

## Selected Publications

- **Paper Title Goes Here**  
  Zheng Zhou, Coauthor Name. *Conference or Journal*, 2026.  
  [PDF](#) / [Code](#) / [DOI](#)

- **Another Representative Paper**  
  Zheng Zhou, Coauthor Name. *Conference or Journal*, 2025.  
  [PDF](#) / [Project](#)

See the full list on the [Publications](publications.qmd) page.

## Contact

Email: [your.email@example.com](mailto:your.email@example.com)  
Office: Your office or lab address  
Affiliation: Your university, department, or research group
